title: Benevolence
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Benevolence''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] modified as a [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]]. The captain of ''Benevolence'' was a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] called [[Melchi]] who discovered it drifting in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pelagon]] after the [[Mecetti Purge]] of [[House Pelagia]]. He assumed control of the vessel and began to mount a medical relief effort. He expanded his efforts to disaster zones across the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] and later got funding from the [[Great Council (Tapani Federation)|Great Council]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. The frigate had 550 beds, 12 [[Bacta tank/Legends|Bacta tanks]] and five operating theaters. The medical personnel included 25 medics and 50 [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|Emdee medical droids]]. Unbeknownst to most outside of the Pelagia government and a selected few of his high ranking crew, the relief effort was a cover for [[Melchi]] to smuggle supplies to House Pelagia.<ref name="LOTE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
